%% Procedure to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability for 'A Tea Party Beneath the Moon' (-> Mid-Autumn-style event in Liyue)"] --> B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"]
    C -->|"recipe for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"| D["Learn the Recipe in Inventory → Precious Items"]
    D -->|"learned recipe 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"| E["Gather Ingredients: Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"]
    E -->|"ingredients for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"| F["Cook the Dish 'Fine Tea, Full Moon' at a Cooking Station"]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft flowchart TD A["Step 1: Gather Basic Resources
- Wood
- Crafting Table
- Wooden Pickaxe"] -->|"wood, crafting table, wooden pickaxe"| B["Step 2: Mine for Stone and Iron
- 17 Cobblestone
- At least 3 Iron Ore"] B -->|"cobblestone (17), iron ore (≥3)"| C["Step 3: Smelt Iron
- Craft Furnace
- Smelt Iron Ore into Iron Ingots (≥3)"] C -->|"iron ingots (≥3)"| D["Step 4: Collect Water and Lava
- Craft Bucket
- Fill Bucket with Water
- Locate Lava Pool"] D -->|"water bucket, lava source blocks"| E["Step 5: Create Obsidian
- Pour Water on Lava Source Blocks to form Obsidian
- (Alternative: do not mine obsidian)"] E -->|"obsidian blocks (formed from lava + water)"| F["Step 6: Build Nether Portal without Mining Obsidian
- Build Mold
- Place Lava with Bucket
- Pour Water to Form Frame (10 Obsidian)"] F -->|"Nether Portal frame (10 obsidian)"| G["Step 7: Activate the Nether Portal
- Obtain Flint (from Gravel)
- Use Iron Ingot to craft Flint and Steel
- Light Bottom Obsidian Block"] G -->|"activated Nether Portal"| I["Entering the Nether
- Stand in Portal to be Transported"] %% Optional branch: Diamond Pickaxe method B -->|"continue mining deeper"| H["Optional: Get Diamond Pickaxe
- Find Diamonds (Y 5–16)
- Craft Diamond Pickaxe
- Mine Obsidian for Portal"] H -->|"mined obsidian blocks for frame"| F

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations (-> Monster Hunter X, MHX)
flowchart TD
    A["Select Armor Sets with Handicraft points (e.g., Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol)"] -->|"Armor pieces with Handicraft points"| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces to reach +10 Handicraft"]
    B -->|"Partially accumulated Handicraft points"| C["Add Decorations (Gems) with Handicraft, crafted at the Smithy"]
    C -->|"Armor + Decorations with Handicraft points"| D["Use Charms (Talismans) that provide Handicraft points"]
    D -->|"Total Handicraft points from armor, decorations, charms"| E["Check Your Skills on the status screen"]
    E -->|"Handicraft +10 → Sharpness +1 activated"| F["Hunt higher-rank quests and more monsters for better armor options and materials"]

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, Brewing Stand"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Brewing Stand"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Awkward Potions"| C["Brew Potions of Harming I with Fermented Spider Eye"]
    C -->|"Potions of Harming I (Instant Damage I)"| D["Upgrade to Harming II with Glowstone Dust"]
    D -->|"Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II)"| E["Brew Splash Potions of Harming II with Gunpowder"]
    E -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F["Make Lingering Potions of Harming II with Dragon’s Breath"]

%% Procedure to obtain the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh"] -->|"Hardmode, Pwnhammer (-> Wall of Flesh)"| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars"]
    B -->|"3+ Altars broken → Titanium Ore can spawn"| C["Mine Titanium Ore"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars"]
    D -->|"Titanium Bars"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword (-> Titanium Sword)"]
    E --> F["You now have the Titanium Sword"]

%% Procedure to center text across cells in Microsoft Excel without merging
flowchart TD
    A["Open Your Excel Worksheet (-> Microsoft Excel)"] --> B["Select the Cells (range to center across, e.g., A1:B1)"]
    B -->|"selected cells range"| C["Open the Format Cells Dialog"]
    C --> D["Navigate to the Alignment Tab"]
    D --> E["Select 'Center Across Selection' in Horizontal; set Vertical alignment"]
    E --> F["Apply the Changes (click OK)"]
    F -->|"centered text appearance across selected cells"| G["Verify the Result"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes (High Looks, Good Health)"] -->|"High Looks, Good Health"| B["Graduate from High School First (Age 18+)"]
    B -->|"Age 18+, High Looks maintained"| C["Start as a Foot Model (Entry-Level Gig)"]
    C -->|"Experience as Foot Model, Public Exposure"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D -->|"Growing Fame, Modeling Experience"| E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog/Runway Model)"]
    E -->|"Fame bar unlocked (Famous Model status)"| F["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs"]
    F -->|"Agent, Elite Gig Offers"| G["Attend Auditions for Luxury Brands/Runway Shows"]
    G -->|"Successful Auditions, High Looks (95%+), Fame"| H["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    H -->|"Sustained Fame and Income"| I["Max Out Your Fame"]
    I -->|"Full Fame, Extra Income Streams"| J["Retire Gracefully or Pivot to Other Fame Careers"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI to fix Valorant's Vanguard anti-cheat errors
flowchart TD
    A["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"] -->|"access to BIOS/UEFI menu"| B["Locate the Secure Boot settings"]
    B -->|"Secure Boot option location"| C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C -->|"UEFI boot mode"| D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D -->|"Secure Boot enabled"| E["Save and exit"]
    E -->|"applied BIOS/UEFI changes"| F["Verify Secure Boot is on in System Information (-> msinfo32)"]

%% Suggested early-game boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat False Knight"] --> B["Defeat Gruz Mother"]
    B --> C["Defeat Vengefly King"]
    C --> |"Mothwing Cloak (dash)"| D["Defeat Hornet (Protector)"]
    D --> |"dash (-> Mothwing Cloak)"| E["Defeat Massive Moss Charger"]
    E --> |"dash (-> Mothwing Cloak), 6+ masks, charms (Quick Focus, Thorns of Agony)"| F["Defeat Mantis Lords"]

%% Procedure to connect a Nintendo Switch to a PC for gameplay capture/streaming
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Equipment: Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC/laptop"] -->|"Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter"| B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B -->|"Docked Nintendo Switch, HDMI cable connected to HDMI OUT"| C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C -->|"HDMI cable from Switch dock to HDMI IN on capture card"| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    A -->|"USB capture card, USB cable, PC or laptop"| D
    D -->|"Connected capture card (-> USB capture card) recognized as video device"| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|"Capture software with capture card (-> USB capture card) selected as video source"| F["Start Playing (view/record/stream Switch gameplay on PC)"]

%% Escaping through the main door in "Granny" on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout of the House and Item Spawn Locations"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Red and Blue Cogwheels"]
    
    B -->|"Wire Cutters"| C["Disable the Security: Use Wire Cutters to disable the door alarm near the main door"]
    C -->|"Wire Cutters"| D["Cut the wires in the basement to disable the electrical lock"]
    
    D -->|"Hammer, Pliers"| E["Remove Barricades: Use Hammer to remove wooden planks from the main door and Pliers to cut basement wires (electrical lock)"]
    
    E -->|"Padlock Key"| F["Unlock the Padlock at the Main Door"]
    
    F -->|"Master Key"| G["Unlock the Main Door after all security measures are dealt with"]
    
    G --> H["Distract Granny with noises while staying stealthy"]
    H --> I["Avoid Traps: Bear traps and creaking floors that alert Granny (-> Granny)"]
    
    I --> J["Final Steps: Exit through the main door once it is unlocked and all steps are complete"]

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator
flowchart TD
    A["Choose a Gamertag Generator Tool (-> Gamertag Generator)"] --> B["Select Your Preferences"]
    B --> C["Enter Your Information"]
    C --> D["Generate Suggestions"]
    D --> |"list of gamertags"| E["Review and Pick a Favorite"]
    E --> |"chosen gamertag"| F["Check Availability"]
    F --> |"available gamertag"| G["Save or Copy Your Gamertag"]

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us"] --> B["Go to the Main Menu"]
    B --> C["Open the Settings"]
    C --> D["Select the 'Data' Tab"]
    D --> E["Find the 'Chat Type' Option"]
    E --> F["Change Chat Type to 'Free or Quick Chat'"]
    F --> G["Confirm Your Age Setting"]
    G -->|"account with age 13 or older"| H["Save and Exit"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: compatible console (PlayStation PS4/PS5 or Xbox One/Series X/S), one TV/monitor, two controllers"] --> B["Start Fortnite"]
    B --> C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account) and reach the Fortnite Lobby"]
    C -->|"second controller"| D["Connect Player 2’s Controller and sign in with a different account"]
    D -->|"Player 2’s controller input (X on PlayStation / A on Xbox)"| E["Join Player 1’s Lobby (see two characters in the lobby)"]
    E --> F["Select a Game Mode (Duos or Squads in Battle Royale)"]
    F --> G["Start the Match (Player 1 -> host selects Ready Up; screen splits horizontally)"]
    G --> H["Play Together in the same game session (split-screen ends if one player disconnects)"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Preparation before the fight: Save, stock healing items, choose equipment, prepare mentally"] --> B["Phase 1: Opening / Early attacks"]
    A -->|"healing items, equipment, mental readiness"| B
    B -->|"learned patterns, remaining HP, Karma status"| C["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    C -->|"refined muscle memory, remaining HP, Karma status"| D["Final sequence / Last attack"]
    D -->|"survive long bullet hell, land enough hits"| E["Post-fight sequence and Genocide ending"]
    A --> F["General tips and tricks: practice in segments, use audio cues, minimal movement, smart healing, expect resets"]
    F -. "applied during all phases" .- B
    F -. "applied during all phases" .- C
    F -. "applied during all phases" .- D
    E --> G["Do not quit or reset prematurely to see full Genocide ending (-> Undertale)"]
    H["Summary of essentials: stay still during blue, move during white; learn Gaster Blaster timing; heal only in safe windows; memorize patterns; prioritize survival"] -. "guides strategy across entire fight" .- A
    H -. "guides strategy across entire fight" .- B
    H -. "guides strategy across entire fight" .- C
    H -. "guides strategy across entire fight" .- D

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> BitLife)"] -->|"high Smarts, high Looks, suitable country (-> the United States)"| B["Focus on Education"]
    B -->|"high grades, popularity, leadership skills"| C["Get a University Education"]
    C -->|"university degree (e.g., Political Science)"| D["Build a Strong Resume"]
    D -->|"graduate degree (e.g., Law School) or leadership career (Lawyer, Business Executive)"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation"]
    E -->|"good health, clean reputation"| F["Enter Politics (local office)"]
    F -->|"local position (e.g., School Board Director, Mayor) and campaign funds (savings, freelance gigs)"| G["Climb the Political Ladder"]
    G -->|"higher offices (Governor, Congress), high approval ratings, political experience, funds, strong reputation"| H["Run for President"]
    H -->|"successful presidential campaign, high approval ratings, strong backing"| I["Manage your Presidency"]
    H -->|"failed presidential campaign"| J["Repeat if Necessary"]
    I -->|"failed presidency (impeachment, low approval)"| J
    J -->|"improved reputation, more wealth, more experience"| H

%% Money-making procedure in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Spring Year 1: Focus on Crops (Parsnips, Potatoes, Strawberries)"] -->|"early-game gold from crops"| B["Fishing"]
    B -->|"gold from selling fish"| C["Foraging"]
    C -->|"forage items, Mixed Seeds"| D["Mining"]
    D -->|"ores, bars, mining income"| E["Animal Products (Chickens, Cows, Goats, Sheep)"]
    E -->|"steady income from eggs and milk"| F["Summer Year 1: Blueberries"]
    F -->|"profit from Blueberries"| G["Fall Year 1: Cranberries"]
    G -->|"high-profit crops (Blueberries, Cranberries)"| H["Artisan Goods (Mayonnaise, Cheese, Jelly, Wine)"]
    H -->|"high-value Artisan Goods"| I["Winter: Preparation and Foraging"]
    I -->|"upgraded tools, cleared land"| J["Invest in Upgrades and Infrastructure (House, Sheds, Kegs, Preserves Jars)"]
    J -->|"improved production capacity"| K["Quests and Special Events"]

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (game uses BattlEye)"] -->|"compatible game (uses BattlEye)"| B["Locate the BattlEye Folder in the game directory"]
    B -->|"game directory with BattlEye folder"| C["Find the BattlEye Installer (Install_BattlEye.bat / Install_BattlEye.exe)"]
    C -->|"BattlEye installer file"| D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D --> E["Follow On-Screen Instructions"]
    E -->|"completed BattlEye installation"| F["Verify the Installation by starting the game"]
    F --> G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F --> H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues"]
    H -->|"unresolved BattlEye issues"| I["Contact Support (game’s support team or BattlEye support)"]

%% Procedure to become an actor in BitLife without God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start a new life with high Looks stat (>80%)"] -->|"high Looks stat"| B["Focus on your appearance to maintain/improve Looks"]
    B -->|"maintained/improved Looks"| C["Participate in activities (e.g., join Drama Club)"]
    C --> D["Graduate High School"]
    D -->|"high school diploma"| E["Apply for a job as a Voiceover Actor"]
    E -->|"Voiceover Actor job"| F["Work hard and get promoted (Actor → Lead Actor → Star)"]
    F -->|"ongoing acting career"| G["Maintain your Looks and Health"]
    F -->|"Actor / Lead Actor / Star roles"| H["Strive for lead roles and fame"]
    G -->|"good Looks and Health stats"| H

%% Ways to connect a Wii to a Smart TV
flowchart TD
    A["Start: Decide how to connect Wii (-> Wii, Smart TV)"] --> B["AV (Composite) Connection"]
    A --> C["Component Cable Connection"]
    A --> D["HDMI Connection (via adapter)"]
    A --> E["SCART Connection"]
    A --> F["S-Video Connection"]

    %% AV (Composite)
    B --> B1["Identify the AV Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable)"]
    B1 -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| B2["Locate AV Inputs on the TV"]
    B2 -->|"Wii composite AV cable + TV AV inputs"| B3["Connect the Cables (composite)"]
    B3 -->|"connected composite cables"| B4["Select the AV Input"]
    B4 -->|"AV input selected"| B5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% Component
    C --> C1["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"]
    C1 -->|"Wii Component Cable"| C2["Locate Component Inputs on the TV"]
    C2 -->|"Wii Component Cable + TV component inputs"| C3["Connect the Cables (component)"]
    C3 -->|"connected component cables"| C4["Select the Component Input"]
    C4 -->|"component input selected"| C5["Power On the Wii and adjust Wii settings for component video output if needed"]

    %% HDMI
    D --> D1["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"]
    D1 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| D2["Connect the Adapter to the Wii"]
    D2 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter connected to Wii"| D3["Connect an HDMI Cable"]
    D3 -->|"HDMI cable between adapter and TV"| D4["Select the HDMI Input"]
    D4 -->|"HDMI input selected"| D5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% SCART
    E --> E1["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"]
    E1 -->|"Wii SCART Adapter"| E2["Plug the AV Cables (-> Wii composite AV cable) into the Adapter"]
    E2 -->|"Wii composite AV cable connected to Wii SCART Adapter"| E3["Connect the Adapter to the TV"]
    E3 -->|"Wii SCART Adapter in TV SCART input"| E4["Select the SCART Input"]
    E4 -->|"SCART input selected"| E5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% S-Video
    F --> F1["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"]
    F1 -->|"Wii S-Video Cable"| F2["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs and connect"]
    F2 -->|"S-Video and audio cables connected"| F3["Select the S-Video Input"]
    F3 -->|"S-Video input selected"| F4["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins of the same denomination"] -->|"two coins of the same denomination"| B["Choose a Partner"]
    B --> C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C -->|"two coins of the same denomination"| D["Hold the Coins"]
    D -->|"two coins of the same denomination"| E["Ask for Permission: “Sara Sarita, may we join your game?”"]
    E -->|"two coins of the same denomination"| F["Toss the Coins"]
    F --> G{"Interpret the Results"}
    G -->|"both coins land on heads → 'Yes'"| H["Proceed with Questions for Sara Sarita"]
    G -->|"both coins land on tails → 'No'"| I["Do not proceed with questions"]
    G -->|"one heads, one tails → 'Maybe'"| I
    H -->|"questions for Sara Sarita, two coins of the same denomination"| J["Repeat: Ask Question and Toss the Coins"]
    J -->|"answers from Sara Sarita via coin tosses"| H

    %% Concluding the game
    H --> K["Conclude the Game: ask “Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?” and toss the coins"]
    I --> K
    K --> L{"Interpret Exit Result"}
    L -->|"both coins land on heads → 'Yes'"| M["Ending the Game: exit the game"]
    L -->|"both coins land on tails → 'No'"| K
    L -->|"one heads, one tails → 'Maybe'"| K

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Card Types in Clash Royale: Win Conditions, Support Troops, Defensive Cards, Spells, Cycle Cards, Tanks"] -->|"knowledge of card types"| B["Choose Your Win Condition"]
    B -->|"chosen win condition card(s)"| C["Add Support and Defensive Cards"]
    C -->|"partially built deck (-> Clash Royale deck)"| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|"deck with spells added"| E["Balance Your Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|"balanced deck list"| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|"refined deck and identified weaknesses"| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|"meta-adapted deck"| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Troubleshooting a flashing blue PlayStation 5 DualSense controller
flowchart TD
    A["Controller is flashing blue (-> DualSense controller)"] --> B["Check the Controller's Battery"]
    B -->|"Charged DualSense controller"| C["Restart the PlayStation 5 Console"]
    C -->|"Restarted PlayStation 5 console"| D["Reset the Controller (-> DualSense controller)"]
    D -->|"Reset DualSense controller + USB-C connection to PS5"| E["Check for Firmware Updates"]
    E -->|"Updated PS5 system software and DualSense controller firmware"| F["Try a Different USB-C Cable"]
    F -->|"Working USB-C cable (if found)"| G["Try Connecting to Another Device"]
    G -->|"Test results (controller vs. console issue)"| H["Contact Support (-> PlayStation Support)"]

%% Completing the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Unlock the Community Center (-> Community Center)"] -->|"access to Community Center (-> Community Center)"| B["Investigate the Community Center (find Golden Scroll in Crafts Room)"]
    B -->|"quest to visit the Wizard (-> Wizard)"| C["Visit the Wizard (learn Junimo language)"]

    C -->|"ability to read Junimo language and access bundles"| D["Complete Crafts Room Bundles"]
    C --> D2["Complete Pantry Bundles"]
    C --> D3["Complete Fish Tank Bundles"]
    C --> D4["Complete Boiler Room Bundles"]
    C --> D5["Complete Bulletin Board Bundles"]
    C --> D6["Complete Vault (pay 2,500g, 5,000g, 10,000g, 25,000g)"]

    subgraph "Crafts Room Bundles"
        D1a["Spring Foraging Bundle"]
        D1b["Summer Foraging Bundle"]
        D1c["Fall Foraging Bundle"]
        D1d["Winter Foraging Bundle"]
        D1e["Construction Bundle"]
        D1f["Exotic Foraging Bundle"]
        D1a --> D
        D1b --> D
        D1c --> D
        D1d --> D
        D1e --> D
        D1f --> D
    end

    subgraph "Pantry Bundles"
        D2a["Spring Crops Bundle"]
        D2b["Summer Crops Bundle"]
        D2c["Fall Crops Bundle"]
        D2d["Quality Crops Bundle"]
        D2e["Animal Bundle"]
        D2f["Artisan Bundle"]
        D2a --> D2
        D2b --> D2
        D2c --> D2
        D2d --> D2
        D2e --> D2
        D2f --> D2
    end

    subgraph "Fish Tank Bundles"
        D3a["River Fish Bundle"]
        D3b["Lake Fish Bundle"]
        D3c["Ocean Fish Bundle"]
        D3d["Night Fishing Bundle"]
        D3e["Crab Pot Bundle"]
        D3f["Specialty Fish Bundle"]
        D3a --> D3
        D3b --> D3
        D3c --> D3
        D3d --> D3
        D3e --> D3
        D3f --> D3
    end

    subgraph "Boiler Room Bundles"
        D4a["Blacksmith's Bundle"]
        D4b["Geologist's Bundle"]
        D4c["Adventurer's Bundle"]
        D4a --> D4
        D4b --> D4
        D4c --> D4
    end

    subgraph "Bulletin Board Bundles"
        D5a["Chef’s Bundle"]
        D5b["Dye Bundle"]
        D5c["Field Research Bundle"]
        D5d["Fodder Bundle"]
        D5e["Enchanter’s Bundle"]
        D5a --> D5
        D5b --> D5
        D5c --> D5
        D5d --> D5
        D5e --> D5
    end

    subgraph "Vault"
        D6a["Pay 2,500g"]
        D6b["Pay 5,000g"]
        D6c["Pay 10,000g"]
        D6d["Pay 25,000g"]
        D6a --> D6
        D6b --> D6
        D6c --> D6
        D6d --> D6
    end

    D & D2 & D3 & D4 & D5 & D6 -->|"all bundles complete in every room (-> Community Center)"| E["Community Center Fully Restored by Junimos"]
    E -->|"restored Community Center (-> Community Center), town celebration (-> Pelican Town)"| F["Complete Major Goal and Prevent JojaMart Warehouse Development"]

%% Basic strategies and tactics to improve gameplay in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck"] -->|"knowledge of cards, elixir costs, strengths & weaknesses"| B["Manage Elixir Efficiently"]
    B -->|"elixir advantage awareness"| C["Build a Balanced Deck"]
    C --> D["Choose Safe Starting Moves"]
    D -->|"initial low-risk cards, info about opponent"| E["Push and Counter-Push"]
    E -->|"surviving troops from defense"| F["Optimize Placement and Timing"]
    F --> G["Apply Defensive Strategies"]
    F --> H["Apply Offensive Strategies"]
    G -->|"defensive patterns, opponent responses"| I["Watch Your Opponent’s Moves"]
    H -->|"offensive patterns, opponent responses"| I
    I -->|"read on opponent's card cycle & play style"| J["Adjust Your Strategy"]
    J --> K["Plan Endgame Strategy"]
    K -->|"experience from match outcome"| L["Practice and Learn"]
    L -->|"insights from replays & top decks"| A

%% Procedure to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams for Codenames"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: 25 codename cards (5x5)"]
    B -->|"grid of 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"| C["Select a Key Card"]
    C -->|"key card (5x5 grid with red, blue, neutral, black/assassin)"| D["Determine Starting Team"]
    D -->|"starting team information (extra agent to find)"| E["Spymaster Gives Clues"]
    E -->|"one-word clue + number from the Spymaster"| F["Field Operatives (-> team) Guess"]
    F -->|"chosen codenames (guesses)"| G["Reveal Codenames"]
    G -->|"revealed result: own agent / neutral / opposing agent / assassin"| H["Ending a Turn"]
    H --> I["Switch Turns (other team follows same process)"]
    I --> E
    G -->|"all of one team’s agents correctly identified"| J["Winning: team wins by finding all their agents"]
    G -->|"assassin guessed (black square)"| K["Winning: opposing team wins; guessing team loses immediately"]

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> BitLife)"] --> B["Access the Escape Mini-Game"]
    B -->|"escape grid with walls, prisoner, guard, exit door"| C["Understand the Grid Layout and Objective"]
    
    C --> D["Plan Your Moves"]
    D -->|"knowledge of guard movement (moves twice, horizontal then vertical)"| E["Avoid Detection"]
    E --> F["Navigate the Maze"]
    F -->|"walls"| G["Strategically Use Walls"]
    G --> H["Calculate Moves"]
    H --> I["Gradually Move to Exit"]
    I --> J["Execute the Escape (reach exit door)"]
    
    J --> K["Life After Escape"]
    
    %% Tips (supporting, not strictly sequential)
    L["Use Patience"] -.-> D
    M["Practice the mini-game"] -.-> D
    N["Use Trial and Error"] -.-> D
    O["Use the Undo Feature (if available)"] -.-> H

%% Procedure to play "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game) and click around"] --> B["Title Screen: keep clicking letters"]
    
    %% Breaking the Title
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' in 'NO' by clicking it repeatedly"]
    C -->|"fallen 'O'"| D["Use the fallen 'O' to break other letters"]
    
    %% Unlocking the Next Stage
    D --> E["Reveal and open secret compartment to find the trophy"]
    E -->|"the trophy"| F["Use the trophy to anger the narrator further"]
    
    %% Repairing the Title
    F --> G["Use the trophy to break the narrator's block"]
    
    %% Entering a New Game
    G --> H["Reach new scene with goat and locked cage"]
    H --> I["Get the key from the squirrel by obtaining a nut"]
    
    %% Finding the Nut
    I -->|"the trophy"| J["Create a nut by knocking down the tree with the trophy"]
    J -->|"the nut"| K["Open the nut on a stone or hard surface"]
    
    %% Trading with the Squirrel
    K -->|"cracked nut"| L["Give the cracked nut to the squirrel"]
    L --> M["Receive the key from the squirrel"]
    
    %% Free the Goat
    M -->|"the key"| N["Unlock the cage to free the goat"]
    N --> O["Watch the humorous ending sequence"]
    
    %% Conclusion
    O --> P["Final messages from the narrator"]
    P --> Q["End of Game: complete 'There Is No Game'"]

%% Set a PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play ("primary") and use shared games

    H --> |"downloaded games"| I["Other users play the games even if the console is offline (Offline Play)"]

%% How to obtain Pale Ore and upgrade the Nail in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Start in Hollow Knight"] --> B["Reach Ancient Basin (below City of Tears)"]
    B --> C["Defeat the Broken Vessel (boss in Ancient Basin)"]
    C -->|"Pale Ore (Ancient Basin boss reward)"| Z["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"]

    A --> D["Head to Deepnest (from Fungal Wastes or Mantis Village)"]
    D --> E["Go to bottom-right near Beast’s Den in Deepnest"]
    E --> F["Find hidden path to small chamber with Pale Ore"]
    F -->|"Pale Ore (Deepnest secret area)"| Z

    A --> G["Climb Crystal Peak (requires Crystal Heart ability)"]
    G --> H["Reach Hallownest’s Crown (peak of Crystal Peak)"]
    H --> I["Collect Pale Ore after platforming"]
    I -->|"Pale Ore (Hallownest’s Crown)"| Z

    A --> J["Rescue 31 grubs scattered in Hallownest"]
    J --> K["Visit the Grubfather (northwest Forgotten Crossroads)"]
    K --> L["Receive Pale Ore from the Grubfather (-> Grubfather) as reward"]
    L -->|"Pale Ore (Grubfather’s Reward)"| Z

    A --> M["Navigate to Kingdom’s Edge (from City of Tears or Tram)"]
    M --> N["Reach Colosseum of Fools, then go left to Nailmaster Oro’s hut"]
    N --> O["Defeat Nailmaster Oro (boss in Kingdom’s Edge)"]
    O -->|"Pale Ore (Kingdom’s Edge boss reward)"| Z

    A --> P["Collect 300 Essence with the Dream Nail"]
    P --> Q["Visit the Seer (Resting Grounds) after 300 Essence"]
    Q --> R["Receive Pale Ore from the Seer (-> Seer) as reward"]
    R -->|"Pale Ore (Seer’s Reward)"| Z

    Z --> AA["Pay required Geo + Pale Ore to Nailsmith (City of Tears) to upgrade Nail"]

    H --> I["Obtain Blue Key (-> Vault of Secrets)"]

    %% Colored Keys - Green Key

    J --> K["Enter Code 'The Challenge' in the Basement (-> Vault of Secrets)"]

    L --> M["Obtain Green Key (-> Basement)"]

    %% Colored Keys - Orange Key

    R -->|"diamonds"| E
    S["Visit Treasure Room Regularly"] -->|"Demon Keys"| D

%% Ways to obtain hardwood in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD

    %% 1. Chopping Large Stumps
    A1["Upgrade Axe to Copper Axe or better at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Copper Axe or better"| A2["Locate Large Stumps on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    A2 -->|"Copper Axe or better"| A3["Chop Large Stumps (2 hardwood per stump)"]

    %% 1. Chopping Large Logs
    B1["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe or better at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Steel Axe or better"| B2["Locate Large Logs on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    B2 -->|"Steel Axe or better"| B3["Chop Large Logs (8 hardwood per log)"]

    %% 2. Secret Woods
    C1["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe"] -->|"Steel Axe"| C2["Access Secret Woods via northwest Cindersap Forest (remove blocking log)"]
    C2 -->|"Secret Woods access"| C3["Visit Secret Woods daily (Large Stumps respawn)"]
    C3 -->|"Large Stumps in Secret Woods"| C4["Chop all 6 Large Stumps (12 hardwood per day)"]

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees – growing and harvesting
    D1["Gather Mahogany Seeds (from Mahogany Trees, Large Stumps, Large Logs, or slimes in the Secret Woods)"] -->|"Mahogany Seeds"| D2["Plant Mahogany Seeds on your farm"]
    D2 -->|"Planted Mahogany Seeds"| D3["Optionally apply Tree Fertilizer to speed growth"]
    D3 -->|"Fully grown Mahogany Trees"| D4["Chop Mahogany Trees with any axe for hardwood"]

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees – simplified steps list
    D5["Gather Mahogany Seeds"] -->|"Mahogany Seeds"| D6["Plant the seeds on your farm"]
    D6 -->|"Growing Mahogany Trees"| D7["Wait for trees to grow, then chop with any axe for hardwood"]

    %% 4. Purchasing from Robin
    E1["Visit Robin's Carpenter's Shop"] --> E2["Purchase hardwood if available (not cost‑effective)"]

    %% 5. Crates and Barrels in Mines or Skull Cavern
    F1["Explore the Mines or Skull Cavern"] --> F2["Break crates and barrels for a chance to obtain hardwood"]

    %% 6. Fishing Treasure Chests
    G1["Fish at any location with a fishing rod"] -->|"Treasure Chests"| G2["Open treasure chests for a chance to obtain hardwood"]
